mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.sort_no
SELECT * FROM sys_menu ORDER BY parent_id, sort_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, menu_name, path, component, perms, menu_type, sort_no) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{menuName}, #{path}, #{component}, #{perms}, #{menuType}, #{sortNo})
